title: Preserve ticket dependency links during import
summary: Ticket dependency edges encoded as `deps:` were not imported into the SQLite catalog, dropping execution ordering from file-backed source state.
evidence: Fixed in `packages/pi-storage/storage/catalog.ts` by importing both `deps` and `dependencies` frontmatter keys.
Reviewer evidence: `.loom/tickets/closed/t-0045.md` uses `deps:` while the importer only read `dependencies`.
recommendedAction: Import `deps:` alongside `dependencies:` when extracting ticket links from frontmatter and verify the link survives import.

title: Import durable worker history instead of skipping .loom/workers
summary: The initial carve-out skipped the entire `.loom/workers/` subtree, which would have dropped durable worker history instead of excluding only clone-local runtime attachments.
evidence: Fixed by narrowing the skip rule to `.loom/runtime/**` and `launch.json`, while `packages/pi-storage/storage/catalog.ts` now imports worker history files and ignores only launch descriptors.
Reviewer evidence: `packages/pi-storage/storage/projections.ts` initially treated `.loom/workers/` as fully local runtime.
recommendedAction: Treat `.loom/workers` durable history as importable canonical data while excluding only runtime-local launch/process attachments.

title: Scope sync projection files by repository
summary: Sync bundle projection files were initially flattened by relative path, which could collide across repositories in a shared space.
evidence: Fixed in `packages/pi-storage/storage/sync.ts` by scoping projection files to `repo-materialized/<repositoryId>/<relativePath>` and updating hydration accordingly.
Reviewer evidence: `packages/pi-storage/storage/sync.ts` initially wrote projection files to `repo-materialized/<relativePath>` only.
recommendedAction: Namespace exported projection files by repository identity so same-path markdown bodies in different repos cannot collide.

title: Keep clone-local worktree paths out of canonical storage
summary: Canonical worktree records initially stored absolute checkout paths, leaking clone-local filesystem details into shared storage.
evidence: Fixed in `packages/pi-storage/storage/repository.ts` by replacing the absolute path with a logical worktree label and using that label for stable worktree IDs.
Reviewer evidence: `packages/pi-storage/storage/repository.ts` initially set `worktree.logicalPath` to the absolute workspace path.
recommendedAction: Persist only logical worktree labels in canonical records and keep actual local filesystem paths in clone-local runtime attachments.
